primary_dx_title: Neoplasm of uncertain behavior of connective and other soft tissue
ground_truth_dx_titles: Neoplasm of uncertain behavior of connective and other soft tissue
Unspecified viral hepatitis C without hepatic coma

supporting_evidence: post-procedural pain in the right side of the abdomen extending to the back
contradicting_evidence: pain is similar to previous procedures and not sharp
missing_evidence: positive findings for gastrointestinal bleeding such as hematemesis, melena, or hemodynamic instability
pruned_candidates.rationale: The tender abdomen and post-procedural pain could suggest a gastrointestinal issue, but there is no evidence of bleeding or severe symptoms.

supporting_evidence: post-procedural pain in the right side of the abdomen extending to the back
contradicting_evidence: no evidence of severe abdominal pain or other typical symptoms of acute pancreatitis
missing_evidence: elevated lipase or amylase levels, severe abdominal pain, or other typical symptoms of acute pancreatitis
pruned_candidates.rationale: The tender abdomen and post-procedural pain could suggest acute pancreatitis, but there is no evidence of severe abdominal pain or other typical symptoms.

contradicting_evidence: no evidence of a seizure event
pain is not sharp and similar to previous procedures
missing_evidence: confirmation of a seizure event or neurological findings
pruned_candidates.rationale: The pain described could be related to a seizure, but there is no evidence of a seizure event or neurological findings.
